name: No-Bake Fudge Clusters
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cocoa, sugar, and salt in a medium-sized saucepan.
2. Stir in milk and syrup.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring until the sugar is dissolved.
4. Continue cooking, stirring occasionally, to soft ball stage (236°F) or until syrup dropped into cold water forms a soft ball.
5. Remove from heat; add butter and vanilla; stir until butter is melted.
6. Stir in oats and coconut.
7. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto waxed paper.
8. Chill.
